{"society_power": 9.5, "state_power": 10.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "WWII mobilization, Beveridge, 1945 Labour landslide, NHS founding", "reasoning": "Total-war mobilization, nationalizations, and the welfare state pushed state capacity back to its wartime maximum, while democratic assertion (1945 landslide), union power, and Beveridge-driven expectations reinvigorated an already dense civil society\u2014a textbook Red Queen expansion of both."}
